--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local end,{},{},function(j,g)local m=S(g)local c=function(c,d,p,C)return w(j,{c;d;p;C},g,m)end return c end,function(j,g)local m=S(g)local c=function(c,d,p,C,N,R,X)return w(j,{c,d;p;C,N;R,X},g,m)end return
